prompt: Consolidate the three nearly identical error response helper functions into a single generic one

turns.content:
<task>
Consolidate the three nearly identical error response helper functions into a single generic one
</task>

1: package httputil
2: 
3: import (
4: 	"encoding/json"
5: 	"net/http"
6: )
7: 
8: func NotFound(w http.ResponseWriter, message string) {
9: 	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
10: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusNotFound)
11: 	json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"error": message})
12: }
13: 
14: func BadRequest(w http.ResponseWriter, message string) {
15: 	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
16: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusBadRequest)
17: 	json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"error": message})
18: }
19: 
20: func InternalError(w http.ResponseWriter, message string) {
21: 	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
22: 	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)
23: 	json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(map[string]string{"error": message})
24: }

arguments.summary: Three identical functions differing only in status code. Will consolidate into ErrorResponse(w, status, message) and make the named functions thin wrappers.

next_steps.description: Add ErrorResponse(w, statusCode, message) that sets content-type, writes status, encodes JSON error. Make NotFound/BadRequest/InternalError one-line wrappers

turns.content:
=== RUN   TestNotFound
--- PASS: TestNotFound (0.00s)
=== RUN   TestBadRequest

PASS

arguments.summary: Consolidated 3 duplicate functions into ErrorResponse(w, statusCode, message). Named functions are now one-line wrappers. Eliminated code duplication. Tests pass.
arguments.final_answer:
Consolidated error responses in internal/httputil/response.go:
- New ErrorResponse(w, statusCode, message) handles JSON encoding
- NotFound, BadRequest, InternalError are now one-line wrappers
- Eliminated 12 lines of duplicated code
All tests pass.
